allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Version:'''', d.get\(''''version'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Deps:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\(''''Peers:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''peerDependencies'''',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='''''''';process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''Version:'''', j.version\); console.log\(''''Peers:'''', JSON.stringify\(j.peerDependencies,null,2\)\); console.log\(''''Deps:'''', JSON.stringify\(j.dependencies,null,2\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='''''''';process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''Sanity latest:'''', j.version\); console.log\(''''Peers:'''', JSON.stringify\(j.peerDependencies||{},null,2\)\)}\)")
